title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Gaurs Group
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
